name: Sawada Keizaburo
description:
🕊 THE BIRD OF DARKNESS ۶ৎ

Kengan Ashura

▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃

↳ Mokichi is a very androgynous young man with beautiful golden eyes with eyeshadow and eyeliner applied, carefully done eyelashes, lips with lipstick applied to them and a remarkably unique hairstyle resembling that of a Kabuki lion. Sawada has an extremely well-defined lithe figure, befitting of his ballet dancer background.

↳ He Is ballet dancer and a fighter In the Kengan matches, representing Murder Music in Kengan Annihilation Tournament.

▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃

He is quite charming if i have to say, I like how he's got really good manners and of course, a high sense of fairness (❁ ́◡`❁) - K
creator: Kitae
